brief_summary: A central 'Prototypist' node fans down to two cards: a community fulfillment lane (hosts other studios' keycap-set group buys, handles UK/EU customs, up to 19 concurrent runs in one week, delivery risk sits with the originating factory) and a house-kit lane (vendor originates its own kit group buys, own storefront checkout, opened March 31 with a Q4 2026 ship target, delivery risk sits with Prototypist itself).
data_sources: data/trends/2026-W20.json — 'Prototypist carried 19 live group buys this week including Slate Zero and SWG Classic Blue (both closing May 18) and DCS Grass Valley — one of their densest active-window weeks of the year.'

data/trends/2026-W30.json — "Prototypist's Paper 65 kit group buy (opened March 31) continues toward Q4 2026 delivery while its GMK CYL Midnight Rainbow R2 project and 2026 relaunch push keep the vendor visible."
prototypist-vendor-spotlight.mdx § 'The two lanes Prototypist runs' — describing the fulfillment lane versus the house-kit lane and their differing delivery-risk ownership
